moments.title: Wimbledon Finals Weekend
moments.blurb: The 2026 Wimbledon Championships conclude this weekend with the men's and women's singles finals on Saturday and Sunday.

angles.name: Anticipation
angles.copy: Strawberries and cream at the ready! Wimbledon 2026 reaches its climax this weekend. Who are you backing for the singles titles? #Wimbledon

angles.name: Finals Buzz
angles.copy: The grass courts are set for a thrilling finish! It's finals weekend at Wimbledon and history is waiting to be made.

moments.title: Wireless Festival Takes Over London
moments.blurb: Wireless Festival kicks off tomorrow in London's Finsbury Park, with Ye headlining all three days of the urban music event.

angles.name: Festival Kicks Off
angles.copy: London, are you ready? Wireless Festival opens its gates tomorrow with a huge weekend of urban music. Who are you most hyped to see?

angles.name: Ye Headlines
angles.copy: Ye is set to headline all three nights of Wireless Festival this weekend! Expect big crowds and even bigger tracks in Finsbury Park.

moments.title: Mostly Jazz Funk & Soul Festival
moments.blurb: The Mostly Jazz Funk & Soul Festival returns to Moseley Park in Birmingham this weekend, running from July 10-12.

angles.name: Birmingham Festival
angles.copy: Get ready for a soulful weekend! Mostly Jazz Funk & Soul Festival lights up Moseley Park in Birmingham from tomorrow. Good vibes guaranteed.

angles.name: Funk & Soul Vibes
angles.copy: Birmingham is about to get funky! The Mostly Jazz Funk & Soul Festival is back, bringing incredible artists and a fantastic atmosphere.

moments.title: Love Island Recoupling Drama
moments.blurb: The latest dramatic recoupling in the Love Island UK villa saw Mara and Charleen dumped, leaving the remaining islanders reeling.

angles.name: Recoupling Fallout
angles.copy: Last night's Love Island recoupling was a shocker! Mara and Charleen are out. Who saw that coming?

angles.name: Villa Drama
angles.copy: The Love Island villa is still buzzing after that brutal dumping. Who do you think is safe, and who's on thin ice?

moments.title: Courtney Love Turns 62
moments.blurb: Iconic rock musician and Hole frontwoman Courtney Love celebrates her 62nd birthday today.

angles.name: Rock Icon Birthday
angles.copy: Happy birthday to the legendary Courtney Love! Still rocking hard at 62.

angles.name: 90s Flashback
angles.copy: Celebrating Courtney Love's birthday today! What's your favourite Hole track?

moments.title: Jim Kerr Turns 67
moments.blurb: Jim Kerr, the charismatic frontman of Scottish rock band Simple Minds, is 67 today.

angles.name: Simple Minds Leader
angles.copy: Don't You (Forget About Him)! Happy 67th birthday to Simple Minds' brilliant frontman, Jim Kerr.

angles.name: Scottish Icon
angles.copy: Sending birthday wishes across Scotland to Jim Kerr of Simple Minds, turning 67 today!

moments.title: Marc Almond is 67
moments.blurb: The distinctive voice of Soft Cell, Marc Almond, celebrates his 67th birthday today.

angles.name: Soft Cell Birthday
angles.copy: Tainted Love, indeed! Happy 67th birthday to the one and only Marc Almond of Soft Cell.

angles.name: Synth-pop Legend
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 67th birthday to synth-pop icon Marc Almond! What's your favourite Soft Cell track?

moments.title: Tour de France Continues
moments.blurb: The 113th edition of the Tour de France is currently underway, having started on July 4th and continuing until July 26th.

angles.name: Cycling Action
angles.copy: The peloton is still battling it out! The Tour de France is in full swing, with gruelling stages ahead. Who's your pick for the yellow jersey?

angles.name: Mountain Stages
angles.copy: The mountains are calling! Expect some incredible climbs and descents as the Tour de France continues its challenging route.

moments.title: Genesis Scottish Open Underway
moments.blurb: The Genesis Scottish Open golf tournament is taking place this week at The Renaissance Club in North Berwick, Scotland.

angles.name: Golf in Scotland
angles.copy: Fore! The Genesis Scottish Open is happening right now in North Berwick. Who's leading the charge on the links?

angles.name: UK Golf
angles.copy: Major golf action this week at the Genesis Scottish Open! Catch all the swings and putts from The Renaissance Club.

moments.title: The Open Championship Approaches
moments.blurb: The 154th Open Championship begins next week, July 16-19, at Royal Birkdale Golf Club in Southport, England, with practice days starting on July 12.

angles.name: Major Golf Preview
angles.copy: The countdown to The Open Championship is on! Royal Birkdale is ready to host the world's best golfers from next week.

angles.name: Birkdale Ready
angles.copy: Practice days start Sunday for The Open at Royal Birkdale! Get ready for some incredible golf as the Claret Jug is up for grabs.

moments.title: Mavis Staples Turns 87
moments.blurb: Legendary gospel and R&B singer Mavis Staples, known for her work with The Staple Singers and her solo career, celebrates her 87th birthday tomorrow.

angles.name: Soul Legend Birthday
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 87th birthday to the incredible Mavis Staples tomorrow! A true icon of soul and gospel music.

angles.name: Staple Singers Tribute
angles.copy: Tomorrow, we celebrate the 87th birthday of the legendary Mavis Staples. What's your favourite track from The Staple Singers?

moments.title: Neil Tennant Turns 72
moments.blurb: Neil Tennant, the lead singer of the iconic synth-pop duo Pet Shop Boys, celebrates his 72nd birthday tomorrow.

angles.name: Pet Shop Boys Icon
angles.copy: It's a sin not to celebrate! Happy 72nd birthday to Neil Tennant of Pet Shop Boys tomorrow!

angles.name: Synth-Pop Master
angles.copy: Tomorrow, we raise a glass to Neil Tennant, turning 72! The voice behind so many Pet Shop Boys classics.

moments.title: New BBC Comedy 'Ann Droid'
moments.blurb: A new quirky BBC comedy, 'Ann Droid', starring Diane Morgan, premieres on July 11th.

angles.name: New Comedy Alert
angles.copy: Diane Morgan in a new BBC comedy? Yes please! 'Ann Droid' lands on July 11th. Get ready for some laughs!

angles.name: Quirky New Show
angles.copy: Mark your calendars for July 11th! 'Ann Droid' is the new quirky comedy coming to the BBC, starring the brilliant Diane Morgan.

moments.title: ITV Thriller 'The Dark' Premieres
moments.blurb: New moody thriller 'The Dark', starring Laura Donnelly and Helen Baxendale, premieres on ITV and ITVX on July 12th.

angles.name: New UK Drama
angles.copy: If you love a good thriller, get ready for 'The Dark' arriving on ITV and ITVX this Sunday. Looks intense!

angles.name: Weekend Watch
angles.copy: Your Sunday night sorted! New thriller 'The Dark' premieres on ITV and ITVX on July 12th. Who's watching?
